caption: he'd rather mine blocks than text me back, so his anniversary is a world he has to dig through to reach me.

overlays.hook: he ignored me for minecraft, so i buried our anniversary six gems deep.
beats: our photos framed in the caverns
he can keep the diamonds. i want the vault.

addressed: made the hook harsher and specific in the first three words
kept it on the live blockheart mine world
